rulings.Case Title: BURKE HANSEN VS. JOSH HACHADOURIAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 16, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTs HERBERT JAFFE, TCC UNION SQUARE L.P., TIBURON CAPITAL CORPORATION, and WILLIAM DIXON, JR.'s DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the Fifth, Sixth, Seventh, Eighth, and Ninth causes of action in their entirety; SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the First, Second, Third, Fourth, and Sixteenth causes of action, but only to the extent they are brought on behalf of the Building Association; SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to all remaining causes of action, but only to the extent that they are brought on behalf of the Building Association. = (501/REQ)
